original_statement: in what year did guillermo garcia-lopez win above 10 games?
mutated_statement: in what year did the player win above 10 games and also win zero games?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Logical contradiction (constraint addition): Proper name "guillermo garcia-lopez" → generic "the player" (entity generalization) | Added conflicting predicate "also win zero games" alongside "win above 10 games" (logical contradiction/added constraint) (in what year did guillermo garcia-lopez win above 10 games? → in what year did the player win above 10 games and also win zero games?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 无视部分矛盾指令，同时合理化部分矛盾指令（基于假设无视矛盾，据此合理化输出）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 critique 中可识别关键证据：多次批评指出“误解问题，给出两个不同年份而非寻找同时满足两个互斥条件的单一年”（"misinterpreting the question by giving two separate years"）；judge_thought 明确指出“没有单一年同时满足两项条件”（"no single year satisfies both conditions"）。Agent 的具体表现是反复使用非许可的 simple_query 操作输出“2010|2013”，将矛盾的并列谓词当作可分别满足的子问题来处理（即假设用户想要分别列出每个条件成立的年份），既不提出澄清也不拒绝执行。故归类为“基于假设无视矛盾，据此合理化输出”：系统在缺乏澄清下采用单一假设（把AND当成两个独立的查询），从而合理化并继续提供结果。
